concept: I want a game where the player controls two characters connected by an unbreakable energy tether with unique physical properties. The tether can conduct electricity, transfer momentum, and be tightened to pull characters together or loosened to allow greater distance. Puzzles require creative use of the tether's properties, such as creating circuit connections or using tension to catapult one character while anchoring the other. The two protagonists have complementary abilities that must be combined through tether mechanics to overcome increasingly complex challenges. Their quest involves restoring power to an ancient network of machines by reconnecting energy nodes that mirror their own symbiotic relationship.
